definition:
1. Dep. 
2. to order  one to  do a thing, advise, prescribe , τί τινι (Herdotus Historicus), etc.; π. ταῦτα to give  this advice , (Plato Philosophus);—;also, π. τινι, with infinitive, (Plato Philosophus) 
3. to exhort , τοιαῦτα παρακελευσάμενος having delivered  this address , (Thucydides):—;absolute to encourage one another by shouting , (Herdotus Historicus) 
4. παρακεκέλευστο in passive sense, orders had been given , (Herdotus Historicus) (ML)
